fields.description: Unique identifier of the mailbox associated with the account.
fields.label: Mailbox ID

fields.description: Icon used to visually represent the mailbox in the UI.
fields.label: Icon

fields.description: Color assigned to the mailbox for easy identification and UI customization.
fields.label: Color
fields.options:
Gray
Blue
Green
Amber
Red
Purple

fields.description: Check to disable push notifications for this mailbox.
fields.label: Disable Push Notification

fields.description: Automation rules for this mailbox. Kept as the source of truth so the frappe_mail_automation Sieve script can be regenerated even if it is deleted by a third-party client.
fields.label: Automation

fields.description: Comma-separated sender addresses (wildcards allowed, e.g. *@example.io). Emails from these addresses are moved to this mailbox.
fields.label: Emails From

fields.description: Comma-separated keywords. Emails with these keywords in the subject are moved to this mailbox.
fields.label: Subject Contains

fields.description: Whether either (any) or both (all) of the conditions above must match. Only relevant when both conditions are set.
fields.label: Match If

fields.description: Automatically mark emails as read when they are moved to this mailbox.
fields.label: Mark as Read

fields.description: Automatically star emails when they are moved to this mailbox.
fields.label: Add Star

fields.description: The shared JMAP account ID these mailbox settings belong to. They are the same for everyone with access to the account.
fields.label: Account
